# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I reviewed the current diff and git state. The only changes are in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` (review-logging metadata); no implementation files were modified in this patch. Therefore there are no file-scoped correctness/safety regressions to report from the code diff itself.

## Amendments

None.
